creator: duerrd561@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Navdeep Parhar from comment #4)

Thank you, great to know that.

I changed the config as you suggested and that seems to have been enough to fix it:

[dd@nfs ~]$ ifconfig cxl0
cxl0: flags=8843<UP,BROADCAST,RUNNING,SIMPLEX,MULTICAST> metric 0 mtu 9000
	options=ec07bb<RXCSUM,TXCSUM,VLAN_MTU,VLAN_HWTAGGING,JUMBO_MTU,VLAN_HWCSUM,TSO4,TSO6,LRO,VLAN_HWTSO,LINKSTATE,RXCSUM_IPV6,TXCSUM_IPV6>
	ether 00:07:43:42:01:c0
	hwaddr 00:07:43:42:01:c0
	nd6 options=29<PERFORMNUD,IFDISABLED,AUTO_LINKLOCAL>
	media: Ethernet autoselect (10Gbase-T <full-duplex>)
	status: active
[dd@nfs ~]$ ifconfig cxl1
cxl1: flags=8843<UP,BROADCAST,RUNNING,SIMPLEX,MULTICAST> metric 0 mtu 9000
	options=ec07bb<RXCSUM,TXCSUM,VLAN_MTU,VLAN_HWTAGGING,JUMBO_MTU,VLAN_HWCSUM,TSO4,TSO6,LRO,VLAN_HWTSO,LINKSTATE,RXCSUM_IPV6,TXCSUM_IPV6>
	ether 00:07:43:42:01:c0
	hwaddr 00:07:43:42:01:c8
	nd6 options=29<PERFORMNUD,IFDISABLED,AUTO_LINKLOCAL>
	media: Ethernet autoselect (10Gbase-T <full-duplex>)
	status: active

In any case, if it helps, here is the output you requested:
